data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify uses a microservices architecture to enable scalability and independent development of services.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes RESTful APIs, containerization, and service orchestration.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Spotify is hosted on a cloud platform to ensure flexibility and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Amazon Web Services (AWS) for global hosting and scalability.

data.title: Data Streaming Framework
data.description: Supports real-time data processing to enhance music streaming capabilities.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using Apache Kafka or in-house solutions for real-time analytics.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Supports asynchronous data processing to improve performance and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Leverages message brokers and event queues.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Uses Content Delivery Networks to reduce latency and improve content delivery speed.
data.technical_spec: Employs CDNs like Cloudflare or Akamai for global distribution.
